subcodes.title: Words spoken at German hostel in Tiberias, 1916-09-26
subcodes.first_line: The teacher cannot perfect. The teacher cannot make one the candle of the human world. Verily, an untutored child who can yet read is better than a soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلم نمی تواند کامل بکند.  معلم نمی تواند شمع عالم انسانی بکند.  البته طفلی که تربیت نشده باشد ولو بتواند بخواند بهتر از نفسی است
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @bringing forth results; fruit, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
